title: 9 Creams to Soothe Dry Scalp in Older Adults with Hormonal Imbalance
description: Aloe vera creams can be a great solution for a dry scalp. Aloe vera has anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce redness and itching, while its soothing and moisturizing properties calm and hydrate the scalp. The gel-like substance in aloe vera contains vitamins A, C, and E, as well as minerals like potassium, magnesium, and calcium, which work together to nourish and repair the scalp.
